description_long: This object is a sculpted mermaid pendant, featuring a detailed female mermaid figure with long, flowing hair and a prominent fish tail. The mermaid is depicted kneeling, with her upper body upright and her arms bent at the elbows, one hand raised near her chest. The scales on the tail and the wavy texture of the hair are intricately rendered, giving the piece a lifelike and ornate appearance. The pendant is monochromatic, with a matte white finish that highlights the sculptural details. The base is flat, suggesting it is designed to stand upright when not worn. There are no visible gemstones or colored accents, and the overall style is elaborate and classical.
description: A detailed, white mermaid pendant with flowing hair and a scaled tail, kneeling on a flat base. The design is ornate and classical, with no visible gemstones.
description_view_0: Side and rear views show the mermaid's flowing hair, detailed tail, and the flat base, with intricate scale and hair textures visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlights the mermaid's face, chest, and raised arm, with the full detail of the torso and tail scales visible.
description_view_2: Oblique front and side views emphasize the mermaid's profile, the curvature of the tail, and the detailed hair and facial features.
description_view_3: Rear side view focuses on the back of the hair and tail, showing the depth and volume of the sculpted details.
